title: osmanthus fragrans f. thunbergii
intro: Osmanthus fragrans f. thunbergii, also known as Sweet Osman or Fragrant Tea Olive, is a fragrant, flowering evergreen shrub native to China and Japan. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating fever, cough, and sore throats. The health benefits of Osmanthus fragrans f. thunbergii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Osmanthus fragrans f. thunbergii is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and its flowers and leaves can also be used to make herbal infusions and essential oils.
